description_long: This is a large, square plant pot with a modern, geometric design and a wide, open top filled with soil or gravel. The pot is primarily white or light gray, with a distinct black horizontal groove running around its upper section. Two opposing sides feature an ornate, raised floral or leaf motif, adding a decorative touch to the otherwise minimalist structure. The pot appears to be made of a solid, heavy material such as concrete or stone, giving it a robust and durable appearance suitable for outdoor urban environments. The interior is deep enough to accommodate medium to large plants, and the overall form is both functional and visually striking. The clean lines and decorative relief make it ideal for placement in public plazas, parks, or upscale residential areas.
description: A large, square, white plant pot with a black groove and decorative floral relief on two sides, filled with soil or gravel. Its modern, sturdy design is suitable for outdoor urban settings.
description_view_0: A plain side of the plant pot with a black groove and no decorative pattern visible.
description_view_1: The front side of the pot, featuring a raised floral or leaf motif below the black groove.
description_view_2: Another plain side, identical to view 0, with only the black groove visible.
description_view_3: The back side, mirroring the front, with the same raised floral or leaf motif.
attribute_placement_context: commonly used as a decorative planter in public squares, sidewalks, or upscale residential courtyards
